title: Spy 77
writer: Robert Baberske, Herbert Juttke, Max W. Kimmich
actors: Greta Nissen, Karl Ludwig Diehl, Don Alvarado
plot: Greta Nissen stars as an Italian noblewoman living a dangerous double life as a spy. A remake of the celebrated German thriller Spione am Werk. Co-starring noted German actor Karl Ludwig Diehl and American matinee idol Don Alvarad...
